title: Duracrete fungus
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''[[Duracrete/Legends|Duracrete]] fungus''' was a type of edible [[Fungus/Legends|fungus]] found in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|underlevels]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Lost Ones]]''

[[Category:Edible fungi]]
